summary: Iteration 147: Platform Features Testing - All 4 new features verified. White-Label Branding, Scheduled Reports, Usage Alerts APIs working correctly. Rate limiting middleware active. Frontend pages fully functional.
critical_code_review_comments: White-Label Branding API fully functional - GET/PUT /api/branding works with live preview, color pickers, and logo upload
Scheduled Reports API complete - CRUD operations at /api/scheduled-reports with history tracking
Usage Alerts API working - /api/usage-alerts returns plan info, usage counts, and limits (Enterprise shows unlimited)
Rate Limiting middleware active - X-RateLimit headers appear for non-enterprise plans
Sidebar navigation correctly includes White-Label and Usage & Limits links in Admin section
seed_data_creation: TEST_ prefixed scheduled reports created during backend tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 147: All 4 platform features verified. White-Label at /white-label with color pickers, app name/tagline inputs, logo upload, live preview. Usage Alerts at /usage-alerts showing current plan (Enterprise), usage meters (13 users, 6 branches, both unlimited), plan comparison. Scheduled Reports at /scheduled-reports with CRUD for report schedules and history. Rate limiting middleware adds X-RateLimit headers for non-enterprise plans.
